@@@ tests/fixtures/fixture_kotlin.kt | kotlin - @brief Comprehensive Kotlin test fixture for parser validation. - @details Covers extension functions, inline/reified generics, DSL builders, delegation, coroutine scope, destructuring, sealed interfaces, value classes, operator overloading, and lateinit. ### IMPORT: `kotlin.collections.List` > Lines: 11-11 ``` 11: import kotlin.collections.List ``` ### IMPORT: `kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow` > Lines: 12-12 ``` 12: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow ``` ### IMPORT: `kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flow` > Lines: 13-13 ``` 13: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flow ``` ### DECORATOR: `Deprecated` > Lines: 18-18 - @brief Successful outcome holding a value. - @brief Failed outcome holding an error message. - @param value The result data. - @param message Description of the failure. - @param cause Optional underlying exception. ``` 34: data class Success(val value: T) : Result() 42: data class Error(val message: String, val cause: Throwable? = null) : Result() 48: object Loading : Result() 56: fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this) { 57: is Success -> Success(transform(value)) 58: is Error -> Error(message, cause) 59: is Loading -> Loading 60: } ``` ### CLASS: `Error` > Signature: `data class Error(val message: String, val cause: Throwable? = null) : Result()` > Lines: 42-60 - @return Resulting sum vector. ``` 229: data class Vector2(val x: Double, val y: Double) { 235: operator fun plus(other: Vector2) = Vector2(x + other.x, y + other.y) 241: operator fun unaryMinus() = Vector2(-x, -y) 248: operator fun times(other: Vector2) = x * other.x + y * other.y 249: } ``` ### CONSTANT: `PI` > Signature: `val PI = 3.14159265` > Lines: 254-254 -
